query: SELECT id, name, LENGTH(images) as img_len, HEX(LEFT(images,20)) as img_hex FROM products WHERE name = 'Mushrooms 250g' LIMIT 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user TRWPPSjpVsMrzts.root --database HH4sKdeJGjocgFW8dJxnCN --execute SELECT id, name, LENGTH(images) as img_len, HEX(LEFT(images,20)) as img_hex FROM products WHERE name = 'Mushrooms 250g' LIMIT 1;
